claims.summary: Telemetry connection attempts, successes, errors, messages, and shutdown should remain observable.
claims.disposition: Verified the existing lifecycle records, exponential backoff, and cooperative shutdown paths.

claims.summary: Bridge-state write locks may create integration delay under load.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded wait/hold timing evidence and threshold classifications; felt consequences remain unscored.

claims.summary: Incoming binary frame size must be bounded before decode to avoid memory pressure.
claims.disposition: Routed to a source/config audit and offline WebSocket fixture; no oversized frame will be sent to the live bridge.

claims.summary: Clock jumps should not silently turn future telemetry into ordinary age evidence.
claims.disposition: Verified separate future-skew evidence and current/stale classifications in bridge health.

claims.summary: Reconnect backoff and ping/pong bookkeeping need deterministic regression coverage.
claims.disposition: Verified existing backoff growth/reset and WebSocket message-accounting tests; a full connection fixture remains non-live.
